# Ninja Docs

## Ninja Docs

- [What is VDO.Ninja?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/readme.md): "Vee-Dee-Oh" .. oh, video!
- [How does it work](https://docs.vdo.ninja/readme/how-does-it-work.md): Learn how VDO.Ninja works with WebRTC peer-to-peer streaming, push/view links, low latency, and URL parameter control.
- [Use cases](https://docs.vdo.ninja/readme/use-cases.md): The use cases of VDO.Ninja are many; they go far beyond the original scope of the project
- [Why use VDO.Ninja over other solutions?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/readme/why-use-vdo-ninja-over-other-solutions.md): Compare VDO.Ninja to other remote video tools for OBS with a focus on low latency, quality, flexibility, and control.
- [Getting started](https://docs.vdo.ninja/getting-started.md): Beginner guide to VDO.Ninja with push and view links, OBS setup, remote guests, rooms, screen sharing, and first-stream best practices.
- [VDO.Ninja basics](https://docs.vdo.ninja/getting-started/vdo.ninja-basics.md): VDO.Ninja basics: publish a camera feed with a push link and receive it in OBS or a browser using a view link.
- [What are stream IDs?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/getting-started/stream-ids.md): Understand VDO.Ninja stream IDs, how push and view links use them, and best practices for secure naming.
- [The power of the URL parameter](https://docs.vdo.ninja/getting-started/the-power-of-the-url-parameter.md): Customize VDO.Ninja links with URL parameters for bitrate, audio, layouts, automation, and advanced streaming workflows.
- [Multi-Person Chat](https://docs.vdo.ninja/getting-started/multi-person-chat.md): Set up multi-person calls in VDO.Ninja with room links or custom push and view URL combinations.
- [Rooms](https://docs.vdo.ninja/getting-started/rooms.md): A room allows for group chat and enables a director to control the room and access to each stream
- [Even higher quality video](https://docs.vdo.ninja/getting-started/high-quality-camera.md): Some basic options to achieve higher quality video
- [Mobile phone camera into webcam](https://docs.vdo.ninja/getting-started/mobile-phone-camera-into-webcam.md): Use an iPhone or Android phone as a webcam with VDO.Ninja, OBS, and OBS Virtual Camera, including optional audio setup guidance.
- [Steve's helper apps & tools](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps.md): VDO.Ninja helper apps and related tools including Game Capture, Screen Recorder, Meshcast, mobile apps, plugins, and production utilities.
- [Electron Capture](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/electron-capture.md): Provides users a clean way of window capturing websites
- [Documentation](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/electron-capture/documentation.md): This Electron Capture documentation was last updated Aug 16, 2023
- [Game Capture](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/game-capture.md): Windows game capture and window capture app for VDO.Ninja with hardware encoding, window-audio capture, and multi-viewer support.
- [Ninja OBS Plugin](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/ninja-obs-plugin.md): OBS Studio plugin for publishing directly to VDO.Ninja, with multi-viewer support and room-source helper workflows.
- [Ninja VST3 Plugin](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/ninja-vst3-plugin.md): Windows VST3 plugin for VDO.Ninja audio workflows, including audio input and audio output use inside supported DAWs.
- [Social Stream Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/social-stream-ninja.md): Consolidate your live social messaging streams, including YouTube, Twitch, and more, into a single chat stream that can be docked into OBS
- [Documentation reference](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/social-stream-ninja/documentation-reference.md): This is a snapshot of the Social Stream documentation, taken Aug. 16, 2023
- [Chat Lite](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/chat-lite.md): Lightweight Social Stream activity overlay integrated into VDO.Ninja
- [Meshcast.io](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/meshcast.io.md): A low latency video CDN and app surface for larger-room and one-to-many VDO.Ninja workflows.
- [Ninja Chatter](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/ninja-chatter.md): Related chat-focused helper site in the VDO.Ninja ecosystem.
- [Ninja Backer](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/ninja-backer.md): Tipping and supporter platform used with VDO.Ninja tip links and creator workflows.
- [Caption.Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/caption.ninja.md): Lets you use the browser's built in speech-to-text service to provide overlay captions for your live stream
- [Raspberry.Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/raspberry.ninja.md): Publish live streaming video to VDO.Ninja at very high resolutions
- [Documentation](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/raspberry.ninja/documentation.md): This is an archived snapshot of the documentation as of Aug. 16, 2023.
- [Mixer App](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/mixer-app.md): Customize layouts, positions, and assets in VDO.Ninja, with remote control to change the layouts dynamically. This is very efficient and low on resources compared to other methods.
- [Screen Recorder](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/screen-recorder.md): Standalone screen recorder with local recording and utility tools
- [WHIP and WHEP tooling](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/whip-and-whep-tooling.md): WHIP allows you to publish to supported sites, like Twitch, directly from VDO.Ninja
- [Versus.cam](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/versus.cam.md): Focus on ease of use and high-bitrate / e-sports streams
- [Speed and Quality Tests](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/speed-and-quality-tests.md): Video streaming quality test
- [Comms](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/comms.md): Multi-group audio chat
- [Teleprompter Tool](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/teleprompter-tool.md): Teleprompter tool for flipping, mirroring, and rotating websites or chat overlays for readable on-camera prompts.
- [LUT maker for color grading](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/lut-maker-for-color-grading.md): PNG and 3D LUT maker for color calibration
- [Native mobile app versions](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/native-mobile-app-versions.md): VDO.Ninja mobile apps for Android and iPhone or iPad, including local recording, screen recording, USB audio, and advanced mobile camera workflows.
- [VDO Applications](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/vdo-applications.md): Useful tools that could help you make your stream better
- [Tech Demonstrations](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/tech-demonstrations.md): Useful tools that could help you make your stream better
- [Invite Link Generators](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/invite-link-generators.md): Link generators to create invite links for VDO.Ninja
- [app.invite.cam](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/app-invite-cam.md): A larger lobby and invite workflow for controlling access before users join VDO.Ninja.
- [Community contributed tools](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/community-contributed-tools.md): Awesome tools made by the community that help with common VDO.Ninja-related tasks
- [Whiteboard](https://docs.vdo.ninja/steves-helper-apps/whiteboard.md): Browser-based VDO.Ninja whiteboard for live collaborative drawing with real-time streaming via P2P or WHIP.
- [Guides](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides.md): VDO.Ninja how-to guides for OBS Studio, remote guests, screen sharing, mobile apps, bitrate and quality tuning, WHIP, Meshcast, and API workflows.
- [Cheat Sheets](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/cheat-sheets.md): Some cheatsheets to help you get started
- [Common questions re: Rooms](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-does-group-chat-work.md): General information about group rooms and how they work.
- [Video bitrate for push/view links](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/video-bitrate-for-push-view-links.md): How to control video bitrates for basic push/view links
- [Video bitrate in rooms](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/video-bitrate-in-rooms.md): How to control the video bitrate inside of a room
- [Room-only mobile bitrate tiers](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/room-only-mobile-bitrate-tiers.md): How VDO.Ninja balances higher guest room quality with mobile device safety
- [How to get permanent links](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-get-permanent-links.md): Guest invites can be configured to ensure guests join with the same stream ID every time they join, allowing for reusable view- and solo-links.
- [24/7 unattended operation](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/24-7-unattended-operation.md): Keep links alive across ISP resets and unattended hours
- [Basic hotkeys](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/hotkey-support.md): Some keyboard hotkeys
- [MIDI, API and WebHID support](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/midi-api-and-webhid-support.md): Use MIDI, WebHID, and API controls with VDO.Ninja for hotkeys, automation, and remote control workflows.
- [PTZ remote control](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/ptz-remote-control.md): How to enable and control PTZ remotely (director, viewer, API, and remote mirror/rotate)
- [Ninja Backer tipping](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/ninjabacker-tipping.md): Accept tips with NinjaBacker.com inside VDO.Ninja
- [Hardware-accelerated video encoding](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/hardware-accelerated-video-encoding.md): Typically only supported with H264 video and often hit and miss
- [Audio Filters & Bitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/audio-filters.md): A guide on how to use Audio Filters & Bitrate in VDO.Ninja
- [Audio-Reactive Avatars](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/audio-reactive-avatars.md): How to make avatar images pulse or react to audio when the camera is disabled
- [Options to record streams](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/options-to-record-streams.md): Compare VDO.Ninja recording options for local, remote, segmented, and backup capture workflows.
- [Cloud Sync (Google Drive + Dropbox)](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/cloud-sync-google-drive-and-dropbox.md): Configure Cloud Sync uploads for recordings using Google Drive and Dropbox
- [Recording Format Options and Settings](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/recording-format-options-and-settings.md): A detailed guide to VDO.Ninja's recording URL parameters, codec choices, container formats, browser compatibility, and tips for getting the best results across desktop and mobile.
- [External guides and how-tos](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/guides-and-how-tos.md): Curated external VDO.Ninja community guides covering show formats, audio workflows, screen sharing, and video quality.
- [How to lock the resolution](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-do-i-lock-the-resolution.md): If you don't want the resolution to vary
- [How to use VDO.Ninja as a webcam for Google Hangouts, Zoom, and more](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/use-vdo.ninja-as-a-webcam-for-google-hangouts-zoom-and-more.md): Step-by-step guide to use VDO.Ninja with OBS Virtual Camera for Zoom, Google Meet, Teams, and similar video apps.
- [How to capture without browser sources](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/capturing-without-browser-sources.md): Capture VDO.Ninja feeds without OBS browser sources using Electron Capture, Vingester, NDI, and virtual camera workflows.
- [How to control bitrate/quality](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-do-i-control-bitrate-quality.md): Control VDO.Ninja bitrate and video quality using URL parameters for resolution, frame rate, and room bandwidth.
- [How to selectively allow access](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-selectively-allow-access.md): Choose between room caps, approval prompts, queue mode, transfer rooms, SSO, app.invite.cam, passwords, and source connection limits.
- [SSO and signed-in access](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/sso-and-signed-in-access.md): Use SSO or a signed-in access layer before sending users to VDO.Ninja.
- [Stream Scheduling and Promotion](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/stream-scheduling-and-promotion.md): Best Practices for Stream Scheduling and Promotion
- [How to send the audio/video output of one OBS to another OBS using VDO.Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-send-the-audio-video-output-of-one-obs-to-another-obs-using-vdo.ninja.md): Send low-latency audio and video from one OBS setup to another remote OBS instance using VDO.Ninja links.
- [Active speaker layouts in OBS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/active-speaker-layouts-in-obs.md): How to build OBS layouts with fixed guest boxes and a larger active speaker or screen-share window using VDO.Ninja.
- [How to mirror a video while Full-Screen - For iPads and Teleprompters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-mirror-a-video-while-full-screen-for-ipads-and-teleprompters.md): Mirror VDO.Ninja video in fullscreen for teleprompters and iPads using browser fullscreen and effects parameters.
- [How to capture an application's audio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/audio.md): How to capture application audio for VDO.Ninja on Windows and macOS using VB-CABLE, Loopback, virtual audio devices, and OBS-based alternatives.
- [How to control VDO.Ninja with Touch Portal](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-control-vdo.ninja-with-touch-portal.md): Controlling VDO.Ninja with Touch Portal using API commands
- [How to publish from OBS into VDO.Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/publish-from-obs-into-vdo.ninja.md): Publish an OBS scene into VDO.Ninja using OBS Virtual Camera and a virtual audio cable, with notes on WHIP and server-based alternatives.
- [How to screen share your iPhone/iPad](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/screen-share-your-iphone-ipad.md): How to screen share an iPhone or iPad to OBS and VDO.Ninja using the native app, QuickTime on macOS, or related mobile workflows.
- [How to get iPhones to output 1080p Videos](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-get-iphones-to-output-1080p-videos.md): Newer iOS devices can support 1080p60 output in some cases
- [How to stream into Zoom without OBS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-stream-into-zoom-without-obs.md): Window sharing into Zoom with the Electron Capture app
- [How to connect a smartphone to computer via USB](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/connecting-smartphone-to-computer-via-usb.md): If Wi-Fi isn't holding up for you, you can try connecting over USB or other adapter-type instead.
- [How to edit an invite after sending it](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/edit-an-invite-after-sending-it.md): There are numerous free URL management tools to make using VDO.Ninja even more flexible
- [How to get highest video quality (for an interview)](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/highest-quality-video-for-an-interview.md): A common question on how to achieve the highest quality capture into OBS for a remote interview.
- [How to stream 4K video using VDO.Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-stream-4k-video-using-vdo.ninja.md): Stream 4K video with VDO.Ninja by setting custom resolution, bitrate, and CPU-aware quality settings.
- [How to get lowest audio latency possible](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/lowest-audio-latency-possible.md): Two-way low-latency audio-only transmissions
- [How to share webcam from inside OBS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/share-webcam-from-inside-obs.md): Share your webcam, virtual-camera, and audio source from using VDO.Ninja inside OBS
- [How to publish to Facebook Live](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/publish-to-facebook-live.md): Publish VDO.Ninja streams to Facebook Live using OBS, RTMP, virtual camera, or screen share workflows.
- [How to embed VDO.Ninja into a site with iFrames](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/iframe-api-documentation.md): How to embed VDO.Ninja into your own website with the IFRAME API
- [Detecting User Joins / Disconnects](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/iframe-api-documentation/detecting-user-joins-disconnects.md): Detect user joins and disconnects in embedded VDO.Ninja streams using iframe postMessage events.
- [Create custom drawing app](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/iframe-api-documentation/create-custom-drawing-app.md): Transmitting Drawing Data Between Clients with VDO.Ninja IFRAMES
- [Generic P2P Data Transmission Guide](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/iframe-api-documentation/generic-p2p-data-transmission-guide.md): Generic P2P Data Transmission Guide
- [IFRAME API for Directors](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/iframe-api-documentation/iframe-api-for-directors.md): Enhanced IFRAME API Documentation - HTTP/WSS API Integration
- [IFRAME API Basics](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/iframe-api-documentation/iframe-api-basics.md): Understanding the VDO.Ninja IFRAME API: Detecting User Joins and Disconnects
- [How to use the green screen just locally](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/use-the-green-screen-just-locally.md): Apply VDO.Ninja green screen effects locally with Electron Capture for OBS-friendly chroma key workflows.
- [How to connect a GoPro to VDO.Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/connect-a-gopro-to-vdo.ninja.md): Connect GoPro cameras to VDO.Ninja using USB webcam mode or HDMI capture adapters for live streaming.
- [How to install RaspNinja on Jetson](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/installing-raspninja-on-jetson.md): Install RaspNinja on NVIDIA Jetson hardware for dedicated VDO.Ninja publishing and capture workflows.
- [How to transfer guests to other rooms](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/transfer-rooms.md): A powerful tool that allows a director to move guests to a different room
- [How to set up a simple chat room](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-set-up-a-simple-chat-room.md): Create a simple VDO.Ninja chat room link with room, chat button, clean layout, and optional camera or audio controls.
- [How to screen share in 1080p](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-screen-share-in-1080p.md): Maintaining a smooth 1080p60 can be tricky, but there are variety of options to achieve the desired results
- [How to control PowerPoint remotely with VDO.Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-control-powerpoint-remotely-with-vdo.ninja.md): Remotely control PowerPoint with VDO.Ninja using the \&powerpoint parameter, API endpoints, MIDI, and iframe tools.
- [How to improve quality of the native app](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/improving-quality-of-the-native-app.md): Improve quality of video if using iOS or Android native app versions
- [How to stream transparent video](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-stream-transparent-video.md): Sending video with a transparent background, or with an alpha-channel (RGBA), is possible, but rather limited at the moment
- [Recommended OBS WHIP settings](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/obs-whip-output-settings.md): Encoder options that can offer smooth playback
- [How to use VDO.Ninja on a website](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-use-vdo.ninja-on-a-website.md): You can host a VDO.Ninja media stream on a website, via the IFRAME API
- [Keep Mic Active in Background on Android Browser](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/keep-mic-active-in-background-on-android-browser.md): How to Keep VDO.Ninja Microphone Active in Background on Android
- [PlayStation or Xbox to VDO.Ninja](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/playstation-or-xbox-to-vdo.ninja.md): Streaming PlayStation or Xbox Output to VDO.Ninja
- [Enabling WebRTC Sources in OBS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/enabling-webrtc-sources-in-obs.md): WebRTC/P2P connections may not work always in OBS Studio, perhaps due to firewalls.
- [Picking the right microphone](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/picking-the-right-microphone.md): Choosing the Right Microphone for Your Live Stream
- [Set Up Proper Lighting](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/set-up-proper-lighting.md): How to Set Up Proper Lighting for Live Streaming
- [System requirements for streaming](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/system-requirements-for-streaming.md): System requirements for streaming using with OBS Studio, including a VDO.Ninja source
- [From OBS to VDO.Ninja using WHIP](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/from-obs-to-vdo.ninja-using-whip.md): Publishing from OBS Studio to VDO.Ninja using WHIP
- [Deploy your own Meshcast-like service](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/deploy-your-own-meshcast-like-service.md): A detailed guide on how to deploy MediaMTX, a ready-to-use media server, that offers Meshcast-like functionality
- [Windows TTS Audio Capture Methods for OBS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/windows-tts-audio-capture-methods-for-obs.md): How to capture the (free) system Text to Speech audio in Windows with OBS
- [Syncing USB audio with VDO.Ninja -> OBS Virtual Camera](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/syncing-usb-audio-with-vdo.ninja-greater-than-obs-virtual-camera.md): Syncing your USB microphone in OBS with the incoming VDO.Ninja stream is pretty straight forward.
- [How to restart your winsock](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/how-to-restart-your-winsock.md): Restarting Winsock on Windows
- [Mesh Network Debug](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/mesh-network-debug.md): Visualize and troubleshoot P2P connections between guests in a room
- [Handling Guest Disconnects and Connection Recovery](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/handling-guest-disconnects-and-connection-recovery.md): Practical playbook for guest disconnects, retry behavior, and fallback strategies
- [Primary and Backup Guests with \&scene and \&slots=1](https://docs.vdo.ninja/guides/primary-and-backup-guests-with-scene-and-slots.md): Use a primary and backup guest feed with scene-based failover, \&slots=1, and audio-safe output links.
- [Advanced Options (URL Parameters)](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings.md): VDO.Ninja URL parameters and advanced settings for OBS, rooms, remote guests, bitrate, audio, video, screen sharing, WHIP, and mobile workflows.
- [Most common Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/cheat-sheet-of-basic-parameters.md): Cheat sheet of the basic URL-based settings
- [Setup Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters.md): Stream ID, create a room, password, labels, groups, devices, auto-start, welcoming guests, sharing a website/file
- [\&push](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/push.md): The stream ID that you are publishing with will be the defined value
- [\&room](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/room.md): Sets a room ID for the session to join
- [\&password](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-password.md): Sets a password to view a stream or to join a room
- [\&hash](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-hash.md): Checks the password
- [\&e2ee](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-e2ee.md): Support for something called "end to end encryption" using "insertable streams"
- [\&label](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/label.md): Sets a display name label
- [\&preferchannel](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/preferchannel.md): Request a preferred audio channel for multitrack recording
- [\&labelsuggestion](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-labelsuggestion.md): The same as \&label, except it asks the user still for a user name
- [\&permaid](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-permaid.md): Will save that stream ID to local storage and reuse it every time \&permaid is used without a stream ID
- [\&group](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-group.md): Puts guests into sub-groups, so they only see others in the same group
- [\&groupview](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-groupview.md): The same as \&group, except it lets you see those groups without actually needing to join them with your mic/camera
- [\&groupaudio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-groupaudio.md): Tells the system to not filter out audio streams when using \&group
- [\&datamode](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-datamode.md): Combines a bunch of flags together; no video, no audio, GUI, etc.
- [\&audiooutput](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-audiooutput.md): Like \&sink, but selects the default audio output device
- [\&sink](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-sink.md): Outputs the audio to the specified audio output device, rather than the default
- [\&audiodevice](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/audiodevice.md): Pre-configures the selected audio device
- [\&videodevice](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/videodevice.md): Pre-configures the selected video device
- [\&vdo](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-vdo.md): Like \&videodevice for selecting a default video device, but you can still choose to change the camera
- [\&device](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-device.md): Same as \&audiodevice or \&videodevice, but applies to both
- [\&miconly](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/miconly.md): Share audio-only; no video publishing allowed
- [\&miconlyoption](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-miconlyoption-alpha.md): A mic only button shows if a guest joining a room
- [\&safemode](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-safemode.md): Tries to load the camera/audio with as little possible complexity as possible
- [\&autostart](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-autostart.md): Skips the camera/audio device or screenshare selection
- [\&easyexit](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/easyexit.md): Won't ask the user to confirm that they wish to exit or leave the page
- [\&webcam](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-webcam.md): Disables screen-sharing as an option
- [\&webcam2](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-webcam2.md): Will show the "Share your Camera" button before asking the user to select camera options
- [\&screenshare](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/screenshare.md): Disables camera-sharing as an option
- [\&screenshare2](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-screenshare2.md): Will show the "Share your Screen" button before asking the user to select screenshare options
- [\&website](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-website.md): Only shares a website with viewers
- [\&fileshare](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-fileshare.md): Allows the user to select a video or audio file as a source for streaming
- [\&intro](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/intro.md): When combined with the either \&webcam or \&screenshare, this option won't auto-load the camera/mic selection page
- [\&host](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-host.md): Shows a pop up to invite more guests to the room
- [\&tip](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/tip.md): Enables Ninja Backer tipping for a stream
- [\&tips](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/tips.md): Shows a help-screen on the guest joining
- [\&welcome](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-welcome.md): Adds a message the guest will see when joining the room
- [\&welcomeb64](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-welcomeb64-alpha.md): The same as \&welcome, except this takes an input as a base64 encoded string
- [\&welcomeimage](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-welcomeimage.md): Lets you specify an image that appears for a few seconds once a guest joins
- [\&hangupmessage](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-hangupmessage-alpha.md): Option for a custom hang-up message
- [\&humb64](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-humb64-alpha.md): The same as \&hangupmessage, except this takes an input as a base64 encoded string
- [\&groupmode](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-groupmode.md): Added to the URL, when not assigned to a group, you don't hear or see anything
- [\&audience](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/setup-parameters/and-audience.md): Secure Public Stream Publishing
- [Camera Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/camera-parameters.md): Options to pre-set the camera settings
- [\&whitebalance](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/camera-parameters/and-whitebalance.md): Lets you manually pre-set the white balance of the camera/webcam
- [\&exposure](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/camera-parameters/and-exposure.md): Lets you manually pre-set the exposure of the camera/webcam
- [\&saturation](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/camera-parameters/and-saturation.md): Lets you manually pre-set the saturation of the camera/webcam
- [\&sharpness](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/camera-parameters/and-sharpness.md): Lets you manually pre-set the sharpness of the camera/webcam
- [\&contrast](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/camera-parameters/and-contrast.md): Lets you manually pre-set the contrast of the camera/webcam
- [\&brightness](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/camera-parameters/and-brightness.md): Lets you manually pre-set the brightness of the camera/webcam
- [Video Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters.md): Resolution, FPS, effects, self preview, mute video, PTZ, codec, buffer, broadcast, scale
- [\&blind](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-blind.md): Video playback is disabled
- [\&quality](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-quality.md): Presets the quality setting for a guest
- [\&width](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-width.md): Sets the maximum width of the video allowed in pixels
- [\&height](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-height.md): Sets the maximum height of the video allowed in pixels
- [\&aspectratio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-aspectratio.md): Changes the aspect ratio on the publisher side
- [\&contenthint](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-contenthint.md): =motion prioritizes frame rate; =detail prioritizes resolution
- [\&mediasettings](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-mediasettings.md): Adds the option to change the video and audio settings dynamically via the settings menu
- [\&noscale](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-noscale.md): Disables the publishing resolution from being capped
- [\&fps](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-fps.md): Sets the target frame rate of the video in frames per second
- [\&maxframerate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-maxframerate.md): Like \&fps, except it will allow for lower frame rates if the specific frame rate requested failed
- [\&effects](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects.md): Applies effects to the video/audio feeds
- [\&backgroundblur](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-backgroundblur.md): Enables the background blur effect
- [\&greenscreen](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-greenscreen.md): Enables the digital greenscreen effect
- [\&virtualbackground](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-virtualbackground.md): Enables the virtual background replacement effect
- [\&transparentbg](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-transparentbg.md): Makes the video background fully transparent
- [\&facemesh](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-facemesh.md): Enables the face mesh overlay effect
- [\&chromakey](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-chromakey.md): Enables chroma key green removal
- [\&chromakeybg](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-chromakeybg.md): Enables chroma key green removal with a background image
- [\&facetracker](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-facetracker.md): Enables the face tracker effect
- [\&overlayfx](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-overlayfx.md): Enables the overlay image effect
- [\&anonymousmask](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-anonymousmask.md): Enables the anonymous face mask effect
- [\&dogface](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/effects/and-dogface.md): Enables the dog ears and nose face effect
- [\&effectvalue](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-effectvalue.md): Sets the amount of blur or effect applied
- [\&viewchroma](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-viewchroma.md): Receiver-side chroma key. Removes a chosen color from incoming video streams without needing anything from the sender.
- [\&imagelist](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-imagelist.md): Can be used to pass a list of background images via the URL
- [\&avatar](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-avatar.md): Adds the ability to select an image, instead of a video device
- [\&fullscreen](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/fullscreen.md): The preview video will be fullscreen
- [\&showpreview](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-preview.md): Forces the guest to have a self-preview
- [\&minipreview](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-minipreview.md): Mini self-preview at the top right corner
- [\&minipreviewoffset](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-minipreview-1.md): Used to position where the mini preview is located by default on screen
- [\&largepreview](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-largepreview.md): Will disable the mini-preview functionality
- [\&nopreview](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-nopreview.md): Disables the local self-preview
- [\&hideguest](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-hideguest.md): Has a guest join a room not visible to others
- [\&videomute](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-videomute.md): Auto mutes guest's video
- [\&ptz](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/ptz.md): Enables pan/tilt/zoom control of the device, if compatible
- [\&webp](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/webp.md): Custom video codec for broadcasts
- [\&webpquality](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/webpquality.md): Quality setting for the \&webp option
- [\&scale](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/scale.md): Scales the video resolution of the inbound video by the given percent
- [\&viewwidth](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-viewwidth.md): Does the same thing as \&scale but you pass the width in pixels
- [\&viewheight](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-viewheight.md): Does the same thing as \&scale but you pass the height in pixels
- [\&dpi](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/dpi.md): Overrides the automatically selected Device Pixel Ratio
- [\&sharper](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-sharper.md): Should 'up to' double the amount of playback video resolution
- [\&codec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/codec.md): Requests a preferred video codec from the sender
- [\&h264profile](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-h264profile.md): OpenH264 software encoding will be used
- [\&buffer](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/buffer.md): Sets the video buffer
- [\&buffer2](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-buffer2.md): Same as \&buffer, but instead includes the round-trip-time
- [\&fadein](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/fadein.md): Has videos fade in smoothly
- [\&broadcast](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/broadcast.md): A useful flag to allow the director to present their own video to the group, often used in conjunction with a virtual webcam or Meshcast. It allows for larger groups rooms by reducing load on guests
- [\&directoronly](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-directoronly.md): Will show the audio and the video of the director but not of the guests
- [\&showonly](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/novideo.md): Only shows any stream ID that is listed
- [\&novideo](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-novideo.md): Disables all video playback on the local computer
- [\&nodirectorvideo](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-nodirectorvideo.md): Disables all video playback from room directors
- [\&slideshow](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-slideshow.md): Plays video back as a series of full-window images
- [\&zoom](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-parameters/and-zoom.md): Set the optical/driver-based zoom on your camera to some preset on start
- [Video Bitrate Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters.md): Changing the bitrate of the outgoing and incoming video and for rooms
- [\&outboundvideobitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-outboundvideobitrate.md): Default target video bitrate for outgoing video streams
- [\&maxvideobitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-maxvideobitrate.md): Limits the max video bitrate out for this publisher, per stream out
- [\&limittotalbitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/limittotalbitrate.md): Limits the total outbound bitrate
- [\&controlroombitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-controlroombitrate.md): Allows a guest to control their total room video bitrate dynamically from the settings panel (under video settings)
- [\&roombitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/roombitrate.md): Limits any guest viewer in the group chat room from pulling the video stream at more than the specified bitrate value
- [\&maxbandwidth](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-maxbandwidth.md): Judges the available bandwidth of a sender's connection
- [\&videobitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/bitrate.md): Sets the "desired target" bitrate in kbps
- [\&totalscenebitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate.md): Max. video bitrate a scene uses
- [\&totalroombitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/totalroombitrate.md): The total bitrate a guest in a room can view video streams with
- [\&roomtier1bitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/roomtier1bitrate.md): Sets the automatic room-only bitrate tier for weaker mobile devices
- [\&rt1b](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/rt1b.md): Short alias for \&roomtier1bitrate
- [\&roomonlylowbitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/roomonlylowbitrate.md): Alias for \&roomtier1bitrate
- [\&rolb](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/rolb.md): Short alias for \&roomtier1bitrate
- [\&roomtier2bitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/roomtier2bitrate.md): Sets the automatic room-only bitrate tier for normal and stronger devices
- [\&rt2b](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/rt2b.md): Short alias for \&roomtier2bitrate
- [\&roomonlybitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/roomonlybitrate.md): Alias for \&roomtier2bitrate
- [\&rob](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/rob.md): Short alias for \&roomtier2bitrate
- [\&maxmobilebitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/and-maxmobilebitrate.md): Sets the normal mobile sender bitrate cap for guest room publishing
- [\&lowmobilebitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/and-lowmobilebitrate.md): Sets the lower fallback mobile sender bitrate cap for guest room publishing
- [\&nomobilebitratecap](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/and-nomobilebitratecap.md): Disables only the mobile sender bitrate safety cap
- [\&totalbitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-totalscenebitrate/and-totalbitrate.md): Sets both \&totalscenebitrate and \&totalroombitrate flags
- [\&zoomedbitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/and-zoomedbitrate.md): Lets you set the target bitrate for a guest when they 'zoom in' (fullscreen) on a video
- [\&optimize](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/video-bitrate-parameters/optimize.md): Video bitrate reduced when the video is not visible in OBS (not active in a scene)
- [Audio Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters.md): Filters, adding delay, bitrate, channels, mono/stereo, muting guests etc.
- [\&proaudio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-proaudio.md): Improves the audio quality, changes default audio settings and sets the audio mode to stereo
- [\&stereo](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/stereo.md): Sets the audio mode to stereo and changes default audio settings to improve audio quality
- [\&mutespeaker](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-mutespeaker.md): Auto mutes the speaker
- [\&deafen](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/deafen.md): Audio playback is muted
- [\&noaudioprocessing](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/noaudioprocessing.md): Disables all webaudio audio-processing pipelines
- [\&echocancellation](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/aec.md): Automatic echo-cancellation is ON or OFF
- [\&voiceisolation](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-voiceisolation.md): Enables OS/UA voice isolation mode for the microphone
- [\&audiogain](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-audiogain.md): Applies a gain multiplier (as a percentage) to the local microphone
- [\&autogain](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/autogain.md): Sets whether audio auto-normalization is ON or OFF
- [\&compressor](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-compressor.md): Applies a generic audio compressor to the local microphone
- [\&denoise](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-denoise.md): Turn audio noise reduction filter ON or OFF
- [\&distort](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-distort.md): Will try to "distort" your microphone's output audio, making your voice a bit anonymous
- [\&equalizer](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-equalizer.md): Provides access to a generic audio equalizer that can be applied to the local microphone
- [\&limiter](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-limiter.md): Applies a generic audio limiter to the local microphone
- [\&lowcut](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/lowcut.md): Adds a low-cut filter
- [\&noisegate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/noisegate.md): Lowers your mic volume to 10% of its current value based on volume-level activity
- [\&noisegatesettings](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-noisegatesettings.md): Lets you tweak the \&noisegate variables, making it more or less aggressive as needed
- [\&audiocontenthint](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-audiocontenthint.md): =music fixed bitrate; =speech bitrate is variable
- [\&audiolatency](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-audiolatency.md): Adds an audio-latency to the published audio stream
- [\&micdelay](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-micdelay.md): Delays the microphone by specified time in ms
- [\&micsamplerate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-micsamplerate.md): Sets the microphone capture sample rate (Hz)
- [\&micsamplesize](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-micsamplesize.md): Sets the microphone capture sample size (bit depth)
- [\&micpanning](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-micpanning.md): Pan your microphone left or right before sending
- [\&mute](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-mute.md): Starts with the microphone muted by default
- [\&automute](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-automute.md): Will mute the microphone of a guest when not loaded in an active OBS scene
- [\&outboundaudiobitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-outboundaudiobitrate.md): Target audio bitrate and max bitrate for outgoing audio streams
- [\&inputchannels](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-inputchannels.md): Audio capture device to select N-number of audio channels; force mono or stereo capture
- [\&monomic](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-monomic.md): Sets a guest's audio input to mono (1-channel)
- [\&volume](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-volume.md): Sets the 'default' playback volume for all video elements
- [\&volumecontrol](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-volumecontrol.md): Shows a dedicated local audio-volume control bar for canvas or image elements
- [\&audiobitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/audiobitrate.md): Manually sets the audio bitrate in kbps
- [\&vbr](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/vbr.md): Sets the audio bitrate to be variable, instead of constant
- [\&mono](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/mono.md): Has the inbound audio playback as mono audio
- [\&noaudio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/noaudio.md): Delivers video only streams; audio playback is disabled
- [\&nodirectoraudio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-nodirectoraudio.md): Disables all audio playback from room directors
- [\&panning](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-panning.md): Pans the outgoing audio left or right, allowing for spatial audio group chats
- [\&sync](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/sync.md): Sets an offset (in ms) for the automatic audio sync fix node
- [\&samplerate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-samplerate.md): Audio playback sample-rate, in hz
- [\&channels](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-channels.md): Specifies the number of output audio channels you wish to mix up or down to
- [\&channeloffset](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-channeloffset.md): Shifts audio channels 0 and 1 up channels, based on the offset value
- [\&playchannel](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-channeloffset-1.md): Will play either the left or right audio stream-only for an incoming stereo stream
- [\&ptime](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-ptime.md): Audio packet size
- [\&maxptime](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-maxptime.md): Maximum packet size of audio
- [\&minptime](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/minptime.md): Minimum packet size of audio
- [\&lowlatency](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/and-lowlatency.md): Enables a preset of settings optimized for ultra-low latency streaming
- [\&audiocodec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/minptime-1.md): Lets you specify the audio codec
- [\&dtx](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/minptime-2.md): Turns off the audio encoder automatically when no little to no sound is detected
- [\&nofec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/audio-parameters/minptime-3.md): Disables FEC (audio forward error correction)
- [Mixer/Scene Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters.md): Layout and design for the mixer in rooms/scenes, preload/hidden scene bitrate
- [\&solo](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-solo.md): Similar to \&scene, but tells the system to be a solo-link
- [\&view](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/view.md): Defines the stream(s) you are receiving, by their stream IDs
- [\&include](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-include.md): Includes streams that do not exist in the room
- [\&exclude](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-exclude.md): Same concept as \&view, except does the opposite
- [\&layout](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-layout.md): Shows the guest a return feed of the current mixer layout when using the Mixer App
- [\&activespeaker](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/activespeaker.md): Auto-hides remote guests videos when added, if those guests are not speaking actively
- [\&activespeakerdelay](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-activespeakerdelay.md): This option can be used in conjunction with \&activespeaker
- [\&order](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/order.md): The order priority of a source video when added to the video mixer
- [\&slots](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-slots.md): Will force the auto-mixer to have that number of slots, even if there are more or less videos available to fill them
- [\&fakeguests](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-fakeguests.md): Creates simulated guest videos
- [\&randomize](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/randomize.md): Random video loading order
- [\&cover](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/cover.md): Has the videos fully "cover" their assigned areas, even if it means cropping the video
- [&43](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-43.md): Optimizes the video mixer for 4:3 videos
- [\&portrait](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-portrait.md): Optimizes the video mixer for 9:16 videos
- [\&square](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-square.md): Optimizes the video mixer for 1:1 aspect ratio videos
- [\&forceviewerlandscape](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-forceviewerlandscape.md): Keeps all incoming videos oriented (rotated) so that the aspect ratio is always above 1
- [\&animated](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/animated.md): Videos in a group scene will slide around the screen when being re-arranged
- [\&manual](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/manual.md): Disables the auto-mixer, allowing for a custom mixer to be used
- [\&locked](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-locked.md): Will force a the VDO.Ninja's mixer output keep the mixed render contained to a specific aspect-ratio, regardless of the browser's window size
- [\&poster](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-poster.md): Lets you specify a poster image for videos that have not yet started playing
- [\&hideplaybutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-hideplaybutton.md): Will hide the default big play button that overlays a video when auto play is not allowed
- [\&motiondetection](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-motiondetection-alpha.md): Does a few things when it detects motion in a video
- [\&scene](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/scene.md): Defines the link to be treated like a scene
- [\&scenerestore](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-scenerestore.md): Restores a guest's selected scene assignments after reconnecting
- [\&scenetype](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/scenetype.md): Shows only the last added video to a scene
- [\&autoadd](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-autoadd.md): Auto-adds the specified stream IDs to the scene
- [\&hiddenscenebitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-hiddenscenebitrate.md): Can be used to force videos not added yet to a scene to run at the specified bitrate
- [\&preloadbitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-preloadbitrate.md): Can be used to change the pre-load target bitrate for scenes
- [\&waitimage](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-waitimage.md): You can add a custom image which shows up while waiting for the \&scene or \&view link
- [\&waitmessage](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-waitmessage.md): You can add a custom message which shows up while waiting for the \&scene or \&view link
- [\&waittimeout](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-waittimeout.md): Specifies a delay for \&waitimage and \&waitmessage while waiting for the \&scene or \&view link
- [\&viewslot](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mixer-scene-parameters/and-viewslot.md): Enables viewing a specific slot from a scene link when the director is using \&slotmode
- [Settings Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters.md): Language, save cookies, remote access, chat widget, chunked mode, raise hands, notify, transcription, closed captions
- [\&language](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-language.md): Sets the interface language
- [\&remote](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/remote.md): Allows remote PTZF control, mirror/rotate transforms, and access to statistics
- [\&controlobs](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-controlobs.md): The ability for VDO.Ninja to Remotely Control OBS Studio while streaming/directing
- [\&allowedscenes](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-allowedscenes.md): Option to filter which OBS scenes a remote guest has access to controlling when using \&controlobs
- [\&stats](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-stats.md): Shows the connection/media stats window by default
- [\&sticky](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/sticky.md): Allows a user to save and then later restore their streaming session settings
- [\&clearstorage](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-clearstorage.md): Will clear all the saved user preferences for all sessions
- [\&disablehotkeys](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-disablehotkeys.md): Disables hotkeys (like CRTL + M)
- [\&showlist](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/showlist.md): Shows list of hidden guests
- [\&nopush](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-nopush.md): Blocks outbound publishing connections
- [\&hidehome](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-hidehome.md): Hides the VDO.Ninja homepage and many links that lead to it
- [\&hidetranslate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-hidetranslate.md): Hides the option to translate VDO.Ninja
- [\&clock](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-clock.md): Shows the current time
- [\&clock24](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-clock24-alpha.md): The same as \&clock option, except it uses 24-hour time for the display
- [\&timer](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-timer.md): Positions the countdown timer
- [\&powerpoint](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-powerpoint.md): Adds a built-in basic controller to control PowerPoint
- [\&widget](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-widget.md): Will load a side-bar with an IFrame embed, with support for YouTube / Twitch / Social Stream
- [\&token](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-token.md): A token for invite/scene links to determine whose the director of a room
- [\&transcribe](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/transcribe.md): Enables transcription and closed captioning
- [\&signalmeter](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-signalmeter.md): Visualizes the packet loss of a guest
- [\&batterymeter](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-batterymeter.md): Shows the battery meter for guests that are on devices with a battery that's draining/charging
- [\&consent](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/consent.md): Will ask the user for content to remote change their camera or microphone
- [\&prompt](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-prompt.md): Ask a publisher before sending a source stream to a new viewer.
- [\&notify](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-notify.md): Audio alerts for raised hands, chat messages and if somebody joins the room
- [\&r2d2](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/r2d2.md): Easter egg \&notify sound
- [\&directorchat](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/directorchat.md): Message ONLY the director
- [\&chatlite](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-chatlite.md): Enable Social Stream Lite overlay integration in VDO.Ninja
- [\&maxconnections](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-maxconnections.md): Limit the total number of peer connections to a source.
- [\&maxviewers](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-maxviewers.md): Limits the number of viewers allowed
- [\&testmedia](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-testmedia.md): Synthetic camera/microphone media for automation and test workflows
- [\&chunked](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-chunked.md): VDO.Ninja chunked and WebCodecs publishing mode for higher-control video delivery, recording workflows, buffering, FEC, retransmissions, and advanced transport tuning.
- [\&retransmit](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-retransmit.md): Relays an incoming chunked media stream to downstream viewers without transcoding it first.
- [\&rampuptime](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-rampuptime.md): When a guest connects, this tries to load video from that guest for a few seconds, even if not yet added to a scene
- [\&sensor](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/sensor.md): Access device sensor data at given rate
- [\&sensorfilter](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-sensorfilter.md): An option to explicitly list what \&sensor data you want to capture and transmit
- [\&postimage](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-postimage.md): Post a snapshot of your local camera to a HTTPS/POST URL
- [\&postinterval](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-postinterval.md): Time interval in seconds for \&postimage
- [\&slot](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-slot.md): Tells the director which slot the guest should prefer to be in
- [\&closedcaptions](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-closedcaptions.md): Enables displaying of closed captioning text
- [\&nocaptionlabels](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-nocaptionlabels.md): Disables showing the names when using the \&closedcaptions feature
- [\&enhance](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/enhance.md): Tells the remote source that you would like them to prioritize the audio stream over other streams
- [\&bitratecutoff](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-bitratecutoff.md): If the total bitrate drops below the specified bitrate, the viewer will auto-hide the audio and video for that stream
- [\&cutscene](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-cutscene.md): Specifies an OBS cut scene to switch to when the bitrate drops below a threshold
- [\&statsinterval](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-statsinterval.md): Lets you change the default stats update interval from 3-seconds to something else
- [\&keyframerate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/keyframerate.md): This tells the remote publishers to send keyframes at a specified rate
- [\&maxpublishers](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-maxpublishers.md): Limits the number of remote peer connections that are publishers
- [\&showconnections](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-showconnections.md): Displays the total number of p2p connections of a remote stream
- [\&obsfix](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-obsfix.md): Disables or adjusts the sensitivity of the VP8/VP9 Codec packet loss 'fix' for OBS
- [\&streamlabs](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/streamlabs.md): Tells VDO.Ninja to not block VDO.Ninja from attempting to run when using Streamlabs for MacOS
- [\&getfaces](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-getfaces.md): Will request a continuous stream of face bounding boxes
- [\&nochunked](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-nochunked.md): Will ignore the chunked version and use the low-latency version
- [\&dropbox](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-dropbox.md): Enable Dropbox Cloud Sync uploads (OAuth or manual token fallback)
- [\&gdrive](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-gdrive.md): Enable Google Drive Cloud Sync uploads
- [\&endpage](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-endpage.md): Redirect to a page after hangup; optional delay
- [\&autoend](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-autoend.md): Automatically end the session after a duration (ms)
- [\&retry](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-retry.md): Control automatic retry/reconnect timing for lost streams
- [\&autorecover](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-autorecover.md): Enables the connection-recovery bundle for unstable P2P paths
- [\&p2pfailtimeout](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-p2pfailtimeout.md): Sets the recovery stall/disconnect timing window for peer-to-peer links
- [\&peerrecoversteps](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-peerrecoversteps.md): Sets how many automated recovery steps are attempted per peer before giving up
- [\&autoreload](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-autoreload.md): Automatically reload at a set interval
- [\&autoreload24](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/settings-parameters/and-autoreload24.md): Automatically reload at a specific time of day
- [Buttons and Control Bar Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters.md): Show/hide buttons, adjust the user control bar and video control bar
- [\&autohide](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-autohide.md): Auto-hides the control bar after a few moments of the mouse being idle
- [\&controlbarspace](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-controlbarspace.md): Forces the user control bar to be in its own dedicated space
- [\&nosettings](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-nosettings.md): Disables the local settings button
- [\&nomicbutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/nomicbutton.md): Disables the mic button; guests can't mute audio
- [\&nospeakerbutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-nospeakerbutton.md): Hides the speaker button
- [\&novideobutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-novideobutton.md): Disables the video button; guests can't mute video
- [\&nofileshare](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/nofileshare.md): Hides the ability for a guest to upload a file
- [\&screensharebutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-screensharebutton.md): Forces the screen-share button to appear for guests
- [\&nohangupbutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-nohangupbutton.md): Hides the hang-up button
- [\&chatbutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/chatbutton.md): Shows or hides the chat button
- [\&bigbutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-bigbutton.md): Makes the microphone mute button a lot bigger
- [\&fullscreenbutton](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-fullscreenbutton.md): Adds a full-screen button to the control bar
- [\&nowebsite](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/nowebsite.md): Disables IFrames from loading, such as remotely shared websites by another guest or director
- [\&hands](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-hands.md): Enables a "Raise Hand" button for guests
- [\&videocontrols](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-videocontrols.md): Shows the video control bar
- [\&nocontrols](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-nocontrols.md): Will force hide the video control bar
- [\&forcecontrols](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-hands-1.md): Will try to keep the video controls visible, even if your mouse isn't hovering over the video
- [\&overlaycontrols](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/buttons-and-control-bar-parameters/and-overlaycontrols.md): Overlay the control bar without reserving layout space
- [Design Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters.md): Labels, styles, clean output, CSS, mirroring, margin, dark mode, background color, disable tallies etc.
- [\&showlabels](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/showlabels.md): Display labels as a video overlay
- [\&fontsize](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/fontsize.md): Let you set font-size of the closed captions and stream labels
- [\&style](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/style.md): Lets you select how audio-only elements are displayed in OBS and for guests
- [\&bgimage](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-bgimage.md): Can be used to set the default image avatar, when using \&style=0 or \&style=6
- [\&showall](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-showall.md): Includes non-media-based push connections as video elements in a group room
- [\&meterstyle](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/meterstyle.md): Optional audio meter style type
- [\&cleanoutput](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/cleanoutput.md): Keeps the output as clean as possible from UI elements
- [\&cleanish](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/cleanish.md): Cleaner output; not as clean as \&cleanoutput
- [\&css](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/css.md): Loads a custom CSS file
- [\&base64css](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-base64css.md): Lets you add css to the URL, but as a single string, so no external reference to a file is needed
- [\&js](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-js.md): Lets you pass a third party hosted javascript file URL
- [\&base64js](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-base64js.md): Lets a user add raw javascript to the URL to run on page load
- [\&mirror](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-mirror.md): Inverts the video so it is the mirror reflection
- [\&nomirror](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-nomirror-alpha.md): Disables the default mirror state of the video preview for a guest
- [\&flip](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-flip.md): Inverts the video so it is upside down
- [\&rotatewindow](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-rotatewindow.md): Will rotate the contents of the VDO.Ninja window
- [\&structure](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-structure.md): Will have the video holding div element be structured to the aspect ratio
- [\&color](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-color.md): You can specify the background color independent of the border color
- [\&blur](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-blur.md): Will try to add a blurred background to the video so it fits the structured video container
- [\&border](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-border.md): Adds a border around the videos
- [\&bordercolor](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-bordercolor.md): Defines the color of \&border
- [\&holdercolor](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-holdercolor.md): Sets the video holder background color behind video tiles
- [\&rounded](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/rounded.md): Rounds the edges of videos
- [\&margin](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/margin.md): Adds a margin around the videos in pixel
- [\&darkmode](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/darkmode.md): Darkens the website and interface
- [\&lightmode](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-lightmode.md): Forces to enable the lightmode / disable the darkmode
- [\&background](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-background.md): Accepts a URL-encoded image URL to make as the app's default background
- [\&chroma](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/chroma.md): Sets the background for the website to a particular hex color
- [\&transparent](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-transparent.md): Makes the background transparent
- [\&nocursor](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-nocursor.md): Hides the mouse cursor over videos at a CSS level
- [\&nomouseevents](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-nomouseevents.md): Disable mouse events on the page (prevent clicks/drag)
- [\&mutestatus](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-mutestatus.md): Show a muted/unmuted state icon overlay on remote tiles
- [\&favicon](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-favicon-alpha.md): Will change the browser's page favicon image
- [\&headertitle](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-headertitle.md): Will change the browser's page title
- [\&rotate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-rotate.md): Rotates the camera
- [\&grid](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/grid.md): Applies an rule-of-thirds grid overlay to the self-preview
- [\&pagezoom](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-pagezoom.md): Add an on-screen zoom slider for the viewer layout
- [\&hideheader](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-hideheader.md): Hides just the top header-bar
- [\&hidemenu](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-hidemenu.md): Hides the VDO.Ninja-branded menu and header bar
- [\&tally](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/tallyoff.md): Will make the tally sign larger and colorize the background of the page
- [\&tallyoff](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/tallyoff-1.md): Disables the Tally Light's visibility for that particular guest
- [\&cleanviewer](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-cleanviewer.md): Hides many of the UI elements and pop-ups that may cause unwanted visual elements
- [\&obsoff](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-obsoff.md): Disables the tally light effects
- [\&pip](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-pip.md): Auto PIP the first loaded video
- [\&pipall](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-pipall-alpha.md): New floating picture in picture mode, so you can pop out the entire video mix as a pinned window overlay
- [\&pipme](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-pipme-alpha.md): Will cause your self-video preview window to pop out into its own picture in picture
- [\&rows](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/design-parameters/and-rows.md): Lets you specify how many rows to use in the VDO.Ninja auto mixer.,
- [Director Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters.md): Options for \&director URLs
- [\&director](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/director.md): Enters a room as the director, instead of a guest and have full control
- [\&codirector](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/codirector.md): Allows assistant directors to join the director room with a shared co-director password and a subset of protected controls.
- [\&blindall](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-blindall.md): It allows the director 'blinding' all the guests at a time with a new button
- [\&cleandirector](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/cleandirector.md): Hides the invite URL options in the Director's room
- [\&hidesolo](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-hidesolo.md): Lets you hide the solo links from showing
- [\&hidecodirectors](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-hidecodirectors.md): Hides the co-directors from appearing in the director's room
- [\&minidirector](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-minidirector.md): Default mini director stylesheet
- [\&orderby](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-orderby.md): Orders guest's by their stream ID in the director's room
- [\&rooms](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/rooms.md): Quick director access to preset transfer-room destinations.
- [\&roomcap](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-roomcap.md): Set a server-side cap on how many guests can be admitted to a claimed room.
- [\&roomkey](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-roomkey.md): Add a trusted bypass key for room approval and custom room caps.
- [\&noclaim](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-noclaim.md): Join director mode without trying to claim the room as the main director.
- [\&requireapproval](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-requireapproval.md): Require manual director approval before guests can join a claimed room.
- [\&approvepopup](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-approvepopup.md): Show a director confirmation popup when a guest is waiting for approval.
- [\&graphs](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-graphs.md): Enable bitrate/codec/resolution graphs in the Director UI
- [\&autochannels](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/autochannels.md): Auto-assign guests to unique audio output channels for multitrack recording
- [\&broadcasttransfer](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-broadcasttransfer.md): Will let you specify the default for whether to transfer a guest from room to room in broadcast mode or not
- [\&showdirector](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-showdirector.md): Lets the director perform alongside guests, showing up in scene-view links
- [\&slotmode](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-slotmode.md): Gives you the possibility to assign slots to the connected guests
- [\&previewmode](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-previewmode.md): Activates the Preview layout for the director's room by default
- [\&novice](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-novice.md): Hides some advanced guest options in the director's control center
- [\&layouts](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-layouts.md): An ordered array of layouts, which can be used to switch between using the API layouts action
- [\&maindirectorpassword](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-maindirectorpassword.md): Lets you set a pseudo 'master room password' as a director
- [\&pausepreview](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/director-parameters/and-pausepreview.md): Reference for the \\\&pausepreview URL parameter in VDO.Ninja including behavior examples and related options.
- [Screen-share Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters.md): Labels, audio filters, type, bitrate, quality etc.
- [\&screensharestereo](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screensharestereo.md): Sets the audio mode for screen-shares to stereo and changes default audio settings to improve audio quality
- [\&screenshareaec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screenshareaec.md): Turns automatic echo-cancellation filter for screen-shares ON or OFF
- [\&screenshareautogain](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screenshareautogain.md): Turns audio auto-normalization filter for screen-shares ON or OFF
- [\&screensharecursor](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/cursor.md): Attempts to show the mouse cursor on screen shares
- [\&screensharedenoise](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screensharedenoise.md): Turns audio noise reduction filter for screen-shares ON or OFF
