- [\&screensharefps](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/screensharefps.md): Set a target FPS for your screenshare (secondary stream)
- [\&screensharehide](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screensharehide.md): Hides the local screen-share sub-window that appears when screen sharing in a room
- [\&screenshareid](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/screenshareid.md): Pre-sets the screenshare stream id for a screen share if its a secondary stream
- [\&screensharelabel](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screensharelabel.md): The screen-share of the guest will have the same label as the guest
- [\&screensharequality](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/screensharequality.md): Set a custom screenshare quality
- [\&screensharecontenthint](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screensharecontenthint.md): =motion prioritizes screen-share frame rate; =detail prioritizes screen-share resolution
- [\&screenshareaspectratio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screenshareaspectratio.md): Changes the screen-share aspect ratio on the publisher side
- [\&screensharetype](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screensharetype.md): Defines how webcam and screenshare of a guest in a room interacts which each other
- [\&smallshare](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-smallshare.md): Makes the screen share behave like a webcam share
- [\&screensharevideoonly](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screensharevideoonly.md): Lets you disable the option to select audio when screen sharing
- [\&suppresslocalaudio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-suppresslocalaudio.md): Will disable local audio playback of a Chrome tab while screen-sharing it
- [\&prefercurrenttab](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-prefercurrenttab.md): Will have the current tab as the default screen-share source
- [\&selfbrowsersurface](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-selfbrowsersurface.md): Excludes the current tab as a screen-share source option
- [\&systemaudio](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-systemaudio.md): Excludes the system-audio as an audio source when display sharing
- [\&displaysurface](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-displaysurface.md): Will pre-select display-share, rather than tab-share, when screen-sharing
- [\&screensharebitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-screensharebitrate.md): Lets you manually set the video bitrate for screen-shares
- [\&sharperscreen](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-sharperscreen.md): Sets \&scale=100, but only for screen-shares
- [\&sspaused](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/screen-share-parameters/and-sspaused.md): Starts any screen-share paused
- [Recording Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/recording-parameters.md): Options to specify recordings with VDO.Ninja
- [\&record](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/recording-parameters/and-record.md): Record functionality for guests
- [\&autorecord](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/recording-parameters/and-autorecord.md): Records the local video and the remote video(s) automatically on their initial load
- [\&autorecordlocal](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/recording-parameters/and-autorecordlocal.md): Records just the local video automatically on their initial load
- [\&autorecordremote](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/recording-parameters/and-autorecordremote.md): Records just the remote video(s) automatically on their initial load
- [\&recordcodec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/recording-parameters/and-recordcodec.md): Lets you set the video recording codec
- [\&pcm](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/recording-parameters/and-pcm.md): PCM audio recordings
- [\&recordmotion](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/recording-parameters/and-recordmotion.md): Takes a video snapshot and saves it to disk whenever there is motion detected in a video
- [Guest queuing Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/guest-queuing-parameters.md): Options for guest queuing and approving system
- [\&queue](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/guest-queuing-parameters/queue.md): VDO.Ninja guest approval, waiting room, screening room, and green-room style queue workflows for directors and invite links.
- [\&screen](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/guest-queuing-parameters/and-screen-alpha.md): The guest can see and hear the director before being activated into the room.
- [\&hold](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/guest-queuing-parameters/and-hold-alpha.md): The guest waits on a hold message until activated or transferred by the director.
- [\&holdwithvideo](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/guest-queuing-parameters/and-holdwithvideo-alpha.md): The guest waits on hold, while the director can already see and hear the guest before activation.
- [\&queuetransfer](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/guest-queuing-parameters/and-queuetransfer.md): Keep a transferred guest queued in the destination room until activated.
- [Meshcast Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters.md): Options for the \&meshcast parameter like audio filters, bitrate, screen-share, codecs etc.
- [\&meshcast](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-meshcast.md): Triggers the service, causing the outbound audio/video stream to be transferred to a hosted server
- [\&meshcastaudiobitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-meshcastaudiobitrate.md): Option to change outbound audio bitrate of the \&meshcast parameter
- [\&meshcastbitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-meshcastbitrate.md): Option to change outbound video bitrate of the \&meshcast parameter
- [\&meshcastcodec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-meshcastcodec.md): Option to change codec of the \&meshcast parameter
- [\&mcscreensharebitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-mcscreensharebitrate.md): Option to change outbound screen-share video bitrate of the \&meshcast parameter
- [\&mcscreensharecodec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-mcscreensharecodec.md): Option to change codec of the \&meshcast parameter while screen-sharing
- [\&meshcastscale](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-meshcastscale.md): Scales down the meshcast video output via the URL
- [\&meshcastcode](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-meshcastcode.md): Lets you specify the Meshcast server to use
- [\&nomeshcast](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/meshcast-parameters/and-nomeshcast.md): Tells a sender to provide a p2p stream, rather than a Meshcast stream
- [WHIP Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters.md): Options for the \&whip parameter
- [\&whipout](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whipout.md): Publish directly from OBS (or other) to VDO.Ninja without a virtual camera
- [\&whipview](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whip.md): Publish directly from OBS (or other) to VDO.Ninja without a virtual camera
- [\&whep](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whep.md): Play a WHEP endpoint as a viewer input
- [\&wheptoken](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-wheptoken.md): Bearer token for WHEP playback
- [\&whipoutcodec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whipoutcodec.md): Lets you specify the WHIP video output codec
- [\&whipoutaudiobitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whipoutaudiobitrate.md): Lets you specify the WHIP audio bitrate (kbps)
- [\&whipoutvideobitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whipoutvideobitrate.md): Lets you specify the WHIP video bitrate (kbps)
- [\&whipoutscale](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whipoutscale-alpha.md): Scales down the WHIP video output via the URL
- [\&whipoutscreensharecodec](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whipoutscreensharecodec-alpha.md): Option to change codec of the WHIP while screen-sharing
- [\&whipoutscreensharebitrate](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whipoutscreensharebitrate-alpha.md): Option to change outbound screen-share video bitrate of WHIP
- [\&cftoken](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-cftoken-alpha.md): Accepts the special token without needing to specify the cloudflare.vdo.ninja part if using \&whipout instead
- [\&autowhep](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-autowhep.md): Auto-derive a WHEP share URL from a WHIP output URL
- [\&svc](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-svc.md): Useful for publishing to WHIP broadcast servers that support scalable video modes
- [\&whepwait](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whepwait.md): Control WHEP ICE candidate collection wait time (ms)
- [\&whipwait](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whipwait.md): Control WHIP ICE candidate collection wait time (ms)
- [\&whepshare](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whepshare.md): Share an external WHEP source to viewers
- [\&whepsharetoken](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/whip-parameters/and-whepsharetoken.md): Bearer token for sharing an external WHEP source
- [Mobile Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters.md): Options to specify push links and guest invite links for mobile phones
- [\&facing](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-facing.md): Lets you specify either the front or rear facing camera as the default camera
- [\&forcelandscape](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-forcelandscape.md): Forces the video output to landscape mode, regardless of how the phone is rotated
- [\&forceportrait](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-forceportrait.md): Forces the video output to portrait mode, regardless of how the phone is rotated
- [\&forceios](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-forceios.md): Forces iOS devices to publish video to this room
- [\&notios](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-notios.md): Just tells the system that its not an iOS device, or iPad, even if it is
- [\&androidfix](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-androidfix.md): Enable an H.264 profile compatibility tweak for Android
- [\&flagship](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-flagship.md): Will optimize the mobile experience for more capable smartphones
- [\&mobile](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-mobile.md): Optimizes a guest/push link for a mobile device to help reduce CPU issues
- [\&notmobile](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-notmobile.md): Optimizes a guest/push link for a mobile device to improve video quality
- [\&app](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/mobile-parameters/and-app.md): Loads the site into an "app mode" and allows you to load a new URL via the website itself
- [API & MIDI Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters.md): hotkey features via API and MIDI
- [\&api](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/api.md): Remote control API (HTTP-GET / WSS-based)
- [API reference](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/api/api-reference.md): This is a snapshot of the VDO.Ninja API documentation as of Aug 16th, 2023
- [API reference - AI Generated](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/api/api-reference-ai-generated.md): Advanced settings reference for API reference - alt version in VDO.Ninja including usage details and configuration notes.
- [Client (node) event example](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/api/client-node-event-example.md): Simple VDO.Ninja API WebSocket Client Example
- [\&pie](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/pie.md): Support for piesocket.com
- [\&midi](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/midi.md): Global hotkey support via MIDI input and more
- [\&midiin](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/midiin.md): Allows for receiving of remote MIDI
- [\&midiout](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/midiout.md): Broadcast MIDI commands to a remote computer's virtual MIDI device
- [\&midiremote](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/midiremote.md): Remote MIDI control
- [\&midichannel](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/and-midichannel.md): Allows for specifying which midi channel (1 to 16) to listen on
- [\&mididevice](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/and-mididevice.md): Allows to specify which midi device (1 and up) selected
- [\&midioffset](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/and-midioffset.md): Allows you to set a series of buttons on a MIDI controller to be mute controls for those guests
- [\&mididelay](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/and-mididelay.md): Lets you precisely delay the MIDI play-out
- [\&postapi](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/api-and-midi-parameters/and-postapi.md): Lets you specify a custom POST URL to send events within VDO.Ninja to
- [TURN & STUN Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters.md): Options for setting up TURN and STUN servers
- [\&turn](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/turn.md): Lets you specify a custom TURN server or disable all TURN servers
- [\&stun](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/stun.md): Lets you specify a STUN server for webRTC negotiation
- [\&addstun](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-addstun.md): Appends an added stun server
- [\&icefilter](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-icefilter.md): Filters ICE candidates
- [\&lanonly](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-lanonly.md): Reference for the \&lanonly URL parameter in VDO.Ninja including behavior examples and related options.
- [\&wss](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-wss.md): Override the signaling WebSocket server endpoint
- [\&proxy](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-proxy.md): Forces your computer to try to connect to the handshake service via a different physical network end point and domain name
- [\&relay](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-relay.md): Forces TURN relay server into use
- [\&autorelay](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-autorelay.md): Automatically escalate failed peer paths to TURN relay during recovery
- [\&pendingicettl](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-pendingicettl.md): Sets how long queued ICE candidates are kept before being discarded
- [\&secure](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/secure.md): Disconnects communication with the handshake server as soon as possible and provides verbose feedback
- [\&tcp](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-tcp.md): Forces TCP mode
- [\&stunonly](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-stunonly.md): Allow only STUN (no TURN/relay) ICE candidates
- [\&tz](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/turn-and-stun-parameters/and-tz.md): Specifies a negative timezone value in minutes for a TURN server
- [Parameters added in Version 24](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/new-parameters.md): Recently added to VDO.Ninja
- [Complete List of Parameters in v26](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/complete-list-of-parameters-in-v26.md): A complete list of URL parameters, although not documented
- [Upcoming Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/upcoming-parameters.md): Upcoming parameters which are currently on vdo.ninja/alpha and/or vdo.ninja/beta
- [Other Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/advanced-settings/other-parameters.md): Not ready for production, not intended to be used or not well-documented

- [Help!](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help.md): Help and support resources for VDO.Ninja, including policies, bug reporting, contact info, and community channels.
- [Fail safes and Backups](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/fail-safes-and-backups.md): VDO.Ninja help page for Fail safes and Backups including support policy and project resource information.
- [Privacy and security details](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/privacy-and-security-details.md): VDO.Ninja - Privacy, Policies, and Data-collection
- [Fragment URL Parameters](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/privacy-and-security-details/fragment-url-parameters.md): Hide URL parameters from server logs using fragment URLs
- [VDO.Ninja Terms of Service](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/privacy-and-security-details/vdo.ninja-terms-of-service.md): VDO.Ninja help page for VDO.Ninja Terms of Service including support policy and project resource information.
- [VDO.Ninja Privacy Policy](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/privacy-and-security-details/vdo.ninja-privacy-policy.md): We strive to protect your privacy, but you use VDO.Ninja at your own risk
- [Abuse & Child Safety](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/privacy-and-security-details/abuse-and-child-safety.md): VDO.Ninja - Abuse & Child Safety
- [Project Contact Info](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/project-contact-info.md): VDO.Ninja help page for Project Contact Info including support policy and project resource information.
- [Where can I report a bug?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/report-a-bug.md): VDO.Ninja help page for Where can I report a bug? including support policy and project resource information.
- [Where can I get support?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/where-can-i-get-support.md): VDO.Ninja help page for Where can I get support? including support policy and project resource information.
- [Feature Requests](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/feature-requests.md): VDO.Ninja help page for Feature Requests including support policy and project resource information.
- [Logos and media assets](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/logos-and-media-assets.md): VDO.Ninja help page for Logos and media assets including support policy and project resource information.
- [What does VDO stand for?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/what-does-vdo-stand-for.md): "VeeDeeOh"
- [Copyright & DMCA Policy](https://docs.vdo.ninja/help/copyright-and-dmca-policy.md): VDO.Ninja help page for Copyright & DMCA Policy including support policy and project resource information.
- [Common errors and known issues](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues.md): Troubleshooting index for common VDO.Ninja and OBS issues, including audio, video, screen share, and connectivity fixes.
- [Can't screen capture certain games](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-screen-capture-certain-games.md): Some games may need settings tweaked to be captured properly with the browser
- [ATEM not working with Firestick](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/atem-not-working-with-firestick.md): ATEM devices don't support HDCP, which some HDMI input devices require. Disabling HDCP with some HDMI splitters can resolve the issue.
- [Very old iPhone support](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/very-old-iphone-support.md): old iPhone errors, such as "cannot verify server identity" or
- [Can't select audio output on iOS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-select-audio-output-on-ios.md): iPhones don't allow the user to select the audio output destination by default
- [Screen-share is just a black video](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/screen-share-is-just-a-black-video.md): Fix black screen problems when screen sharing with VDO.Ninja, OBS, Chrome, DRM-protected apps, and hardware acceleration conflicts.
- [Mic audio dropping out](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/mic-audio-dropping-out.md): If your microphone drops out after a few seconds
- [Loss of audio when OBS minimized](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/loss-of-audio-when-obs-minimized.md): Troubleshooting guide for Loss of audio when OBS minimized in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Known issues](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/known-issues.md): Known issues or problems, bugs, and limitations
- [Echo or feedback issues](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/echo-or-feedback-issues.md): Guests are sometimes able to hear themselves
- [Works on WiFi but not on 4G](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/works-on-wifi-but-not-on-4g.md): Sometimes 4G or 5G, or even some corporate networks, block VDO.Ninja from working
- [Can't capture an application's audio when screen-sharing](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-capture-an-applications-audio-when-screen-sharing.md): Troubleshooting guide for Can't capture an application's audio when screen-sharing in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Can't load camera both in OBS and VDON](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-load-camera-both-in-obs-and-vdon.md): Can't load camera both in both VDO.Ninja and OBS (or other app) at the same time
- [Can't select a camera lens on mobile](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-select-a-camera-lens-on-mobile.md): Accessing the wide-angle or zoom lens on your camera
- [No video in OBS, just an "Add camera" button](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/no-video-in-obs-just-an-add-camera-button.md): If you trying to add your video to OBS or Streamlabs, but instead of video you see buttons saying something like "Add camera" or "Share camera", double check your browser source links.
- [Audio over VDO.Ninja isn't working](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/audio-over-vdo.ninja-isnt-working.md): Troubleshooting guide for no audio in VDO.Ninja, OBS browser sources, Windows playback, sample-rate issues, and mobile audio workflows.
- [Loading circle shows in OBS or browser](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/loading-circle-shows-in-obs-or-browser.md): Troubleshooting guide for Loading circle shows in OBS or browser in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Appearing then disappearing guest](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/appearing-then-disappearing-guest.md): Troubleshooting guide for Appearing then disappearing guest in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Can't auto-start screen sharing](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-auto-start-screen-sharing.md): Troubleshooting guide for Can't auto-start screen sharing in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Audio Clicking / Popping / Distortion](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/audio-clicking-popping-distortion.md): Audio Troubleshooting Guide for VDO.Ninja
- [Outbound OBS stream audio is crackling](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/outbound-obs-stream-audio-crackling.md): Troubleshooting guide for crackling, robotic, distorted, or broken audio in the outbound OBS stream when VDO.Ninja sounds clean locally.
- [Can't share my screen](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-share-my-screen.md): Some common problems and solutions with screen sharing
- [Nothing shows up in OBS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/nothing-shows-up-in-obs-or-it-is-choppy.md): OBS Studio is just black in the browser source; potentially you hear audio, but nothing else.
- [Already in use or claimed errors](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/already-in-use-or-claimed-errors.md): "The stream ID you are publishing to is already in use" and other such errors
- [Blue spinning window](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/blue-spinning-window.md): Troubleshooting guide for Blue spinning window in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Cursor shows trailing or artifacting](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cursor-shows-trailing-or-artifacting.md): When screen sharing, the mouse cursor causes visual glitches or trailing
- [Packet Loss](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/packet-loss.md): Troubleshooting packet loss in VDO.Ninja, including choppy video, distorted audio, Wi-Fi problems, relay use, mobile networks, and bitrate tuning.
- [Overheating](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/overheating.md): Mobile and laptop devices may overheat under prolong use
- [Audio is delayed in OBS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/audio-is-delayed-in-obs.md): Troubleshooting guide for Audio is delayed in OBS in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [vMix High CPU](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/vmix-high-cpu.md): Some ideas on how to reduce total system load on a vMix system using VDO.Ninja
- [OBS Virtual Camera has low FPS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/obs-virtual-camera-low-has-fps.md): Why are the resolution and framerate sometimes not the same as my OBS output settings?
- [Virtual camera not working on Mac](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/virtual-camera-not-working-on-mac.md): If the OBS Virtual Camera is not appearing in Chrome or your browser after installing OBS on MacOS, you may need to enable screen recording permissions.
- [Mic stops on MacOS when OBS opens](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/mic-stops-on-macos-when-obs-opens.md): Troubleshooting guide for Mic stops on MacOS when OBS opens in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Video stream looks corrupted](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/video-is-pixelated.md): Troubleshooting pixelated, smeared, corrupted, or wrong-color video in VDO.Ninja and OBS, especially under packet loss or decoder problems.
- [Video freezes mid-stream](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/video-freezes-mid-stream.md): Troubleshooting guide for Video freezes mid-stream in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Webcam freezes after a time](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/webcam-freezes-after-a-time.md): Some laptops will put the webcam to sleep for a moment to save power, causing freezing
- [Is the VDO.Ninja server down?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/is-the-vdo-ninja-server-down.md): Troubleshooting guide for Is the VDO.Ninja server down? in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Hosted your own TURN server?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/hosted-your-own-turn-server.md): Troubleshooting guide for Hosted your own TURN server? in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Can't screen-share from certain devices](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/why-cant-i-screen-share-from-certain-devices.md): Troubleshooting guide for Can't screen-share from certain devices in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Cursor shows when screen-sharing](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cursor-shows-when-screen-sharing.md): Troubleshooting guide for Cursor shows when screen-sharing in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Getting “Overconstrained" Camera Error](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/getting-overconstrained-camera-error.md): Troubleshooting guide for Getting “Overconstrained" Camera Error in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Autoplay doesn't work in Chrome or vMix v77](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/autoplay-doesnt-work-in-chrome-or-vmix-v77.md): Browsers may prevent videos from auto-playing on initial page load
- [Low frame rates](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/low-frame-rates.md): Troubleshooting guide for Low frame rates in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Meshcast connection issues](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/meshcast-connection-issues.md): Quick checks when guests or director can’t see/hear via Meshcast
- [View link not showing a guest](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/view-link-not-showing-guest.md): Why a ?view link shows nothing or the wrong thing
- [Solo Talk not working](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/solo-talk-not-working.md): Solo Talk doesn’t engage or behave as expected
- [Music sounds suppressed or ducked](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/music-sounds-suppressed-or-ducked.md): Music or jingles sound thin, ducked, or distorted
- [Enterprise firewall checklist](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/enterprise-firewall-checklist.md): What to ask IT for when enterprise firewalls break calls
- [Black borders around the video in OBS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/there-are-black-borders-around-the-video-in-obs..md): Troubleshooting guide for There are black borders around the video in OBS. in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Mic's volume keeps changing](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/mics-volume-keeps-changing.md): The mic's gain won't stay still or the auto-gain won't turn off
- [Enable Camera / Microphone permissions](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/enable-camera-microphone-permissions.md): Permission denied when trying to access the camera or microphone
- [FPS drop if app not in focus](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/fps-drop-if-app-not-in-focus.md): If screen sharing, you may see a frame rate drop once VDO.Ninja loses focus. This background app-throttling can normally be disabled
- [Surround sound error when screen sharing with USB headset](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/surround-sound-error-when-screen-sharing-with-usb-headset.md): Some surround sound headphones can cause VDO.Ninja to have audio problems, including failed screen sharing
- [Relay candidate being selected](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/relay-candidate-being-selected.md): When a relay candidate is selected, the connection is being forwarded (securely) via a hosted TURN relay server, rather than directly via peer to peer. This can add latency and limit the video quality
- [Camera works in Safari; not Chrome](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/camera-works-in-safari-not-chrome.md): For those on macOS, if the camera works in Safari, but not Chrome, try the following options
- [Robotic Audio Distortion](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/robotic-audio-distortion.md): Some causes and solutions for robotic audio issues
- [Can't load camera from non-SSL host](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-load-camera-from-non-ssl-host.md): Can't load camera from local webserver issues and how to resolve them.
- [Camera on macOS doesn't show?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/camera-on-macos-doesnt-show.md): My camera isn't appearing in Chrome on macOS anymore. why?
- [Can't screen share Adobe Lightroom](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-screen-share-adobe-lightroom.md): Some applications don't like being screen captured by Chrome; there are some options however
- [Decklink support?](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/decklink-support.md): Blackmagic Decklink support isn't compatible with Google Chrome (chromium) browsers, but support is still possible.
- [iOS audio stops during phone calls](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/ios-audio-stops-during-phone-calls.md): Troubleshooting guide for iOS audio stops during phone calls in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Can't turn off echo-cancellation on macOS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-turn-off-echo-cancellation-on-macos.md): Troubleshooting guide for Can't turn off echo-cancellation on macOS in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Video lag grows over time](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/video-lag-grows-over-time.md): Troubleshooting guide for Video lag grows over time in VDO.Ninja and OBS with likely causes and practical fixes.
- [Can't connect unless via VPN](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/cant-connect-unless-via-vpn.md): At a corporate event? Maybe state censorship is blocking access? Here's some options if a VPN isn't possible.
- [Use a Virtual Camera more than Once](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/use-a-virtual-camera-more-than-once.md): Using Smartphone as Virtual Camera with VDO.Ninja across multiple applications
- [OBS Virtual Camera not working](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/obs-virtual-camera-not-working.md): OBS Virtual Camera Troubleshooting Guide
- [Unexpected Emojis, Balloons](https://docs.vdo.ninja/common-errors-and-known-issues/unexpected-emojis-balloons.md): Unexpected Emojis, Balloons, or Background Blur Appearing on Your Camera (Apple Devices)
- [Platform specific issues](https://docs.vdo.ninja/platform-specific-issues.md): Platform-specific VDO.Ninja notes and fixes for Android, iOS, macOS, and Opera GX environments.
- [Android](https://docs.vdo.ninja/platform-specific-issues/android.md): Mobile app version of VDO.Ninja and other Android related topics
- [macOS](https://docs.vdo.ninja/platform-specific-issues/macos.md): Platform specific VDO.Ninja notes for macOS including compatibility limits and recommended fixes.
- [iOS (iPhone/iPad)](https://docs.vdo.ninja/platform-specific-issues/ios.md): iOS-specific notes, limitations, and tips for using VDO.Ninja on iPhone and iPad.
- [Firefox](https://docs.vdo.ninja/platform-specific-issues/untitled-2.md): Platform specific VDO.Ninja notes for Firefox including compatibility limits and recommended fixes.
- [Opera GX](https://docs.vdo.ninja/platform-specific-issues/opera-gx.md): Platform specific VDO.Ninja notes for Opera GX including compatibility limits and recommended fixes.
- [Useful Links](https://docs.vdo.ninja/important-links.md): All useful links you might take a look at
- [FAQ](https://docs.vdo.ninja/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about VDO.Ninja, with project links, support channels, bug reporting, and contact details.
- [Sponsor ❤](https://docs.vdo.ninja/sponsor.md): Details and links if interested in making a gift to the developer of VDO.Ninja


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.vdo.ninja/readme.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
